tests/test_match_raw_blocks.py + assembled-app response raw_analysis_text blocks carrying all seven AC-008a fields; construction-time guard raises on score/fatalistic language; no LLM-readiness claim (D4). Real deployed-boundary deferred to T22.

evidence_ref: tests/test_match_privacy.py + tests/test_match_errors.py — second_person_consent_confirmed is REQUIRED and server-enforced (422 when false/absent, AC-012c); no raw birth datetime/tz/lon/lat/person payload or API key echoed in the 422 body (AC-009d/AC-012a). Full privacy logging (hash-only consent log, caplog no-PII) is completed at T11; this entry records the consent-gate + error-body no-echo verified after T10. Real deployed-boundary deferred to T22.

tests/test_match_determinism.py — order-independent canonical hash + per-ephemeris-mode engine snapshot (committed == live) passing in both SWIEPH and forced MOSEPH modes; the snapshotted engine output is exactly what the endpoint returns. Real deployed-boundary deferred to T22.

tests/test_match_observability.py (evidence-ledger completeness from Milestone A). T22 real-boundary smoke against the LIVE deployed backend https://api.fufire.space (Railway deploy a8a596ce from commit a134e50, health=healthy) with a real enterprise API key, 2026-07-04: (1) happy path birth_input+consent -> HTTP 200 in 0.07s; (2) quality_flags.ephemeris_mode=SWIEPH (real ephemeris, no MOSEPH fallback, attestation parity); (3) pair layers = exactly the 3 MVP layers day_master_comparison/spouse_palace_day_branch/wuxing_vector_comparison (D3); (4) recursive score-key absence on the live response - total_score/sub_scores/score_class/awarded_points/score_confidence all absent (D1); (5) no MISSING_INTERACTION_TABLE stub, no blocked marriage/fate language; (6) consent-absent -> HTTP 422 (server-side consent enforcement live, AC-012c); (7) zero raw birth-data occurrences (sentinel date/tz/lon/lat) in the live Railway logs (AC-012a runtime). Closes MISSING-005 for the backend.
verified_by: orchestrator (Opus 4.8), live curl smoke against api.fufire.space with the real injected FUFIRE_API_KEYS enterprise key, 2026-07-04 - not trusted from tests alone.

evidence_ref: Frontend launch verified live at https://fufireapilive-production.up.railway.app 2026-07-04 (Railway service FuFire_API_LIVE, Dockerfile build, deploy 6449d78d from commit 94838b0). CAN-015 flag flip executed under explicit user sign-off: VITE_FEATURE_HEHUN=true set as a Railway service variable AND passed into the Docker build stage via a new ARG/ENV (the flag is build-time; without the ARG the first flag-ON deploy stayed hidden — caught by live verification, not Online status). Live checks: (1) served openapi.json carries POST /v1/match/bazi-hehun; (2) live public/llms.txt now advertises the endpoint (## POST /v1/match/bazi-hehun) with the flag ON (was 0 with flag OFF - leak-guard genuinely toggles); (3) the live llms Hehun section surfaces second_person_consent_confirmed and carries NO marriage/perfect-match/compatibility-score/breakup/fate-certainty language (honest framing at the boundary). Frontend root HTTP 200.
verified_by: orchestrator (Opus 4.8), live curl against the deployed landingpage, 2026-07-04 - not trusted from build logs alone.

evidence_ref: docs/plans/2026-07-04-bazi-hehun-gender-field.md (GF-1..GF-6), resolves MISSING-002/007, opens MISSING-008. MatchPersonInput(BaziRequest) adds optional gender: Literal['male','female','divers'] scoped to /v1/match/bazi-hehun only (regression-locked: tests/test_match_schema.py::test_bazi_request_itself_carries_no_gender_field asserts the SHARED BaziRequest used by /calculate/bazi and /personalize stays gender-free). spouse_star split out of derived_fields into its own SpouseStarResult (match/individual.py): gender omitted -> PENDING_TABLES/GENDER_NOT_PROVIDED; gender=divers -> PENDING_TABLES/MISSING-008 (never falls back to male/female's rule, guarded structurally by SpouseStarResult.__post_init__); gender=male/female -> CALCULATED with a located occurrence list computed from match/ten_gods.py (MISSING-002, already sourced+validated) + the ruleset spouse_star_convention, cross-checked in tests/test_match_individual_analysis.py by an INDEPENDENT re-derivation (separate loop, not the module's private helper). Consent copy (OQ-004, provisional agent-default pending user confirmation) extended to name gender explicitly. Full suite (2725 passed/61 skipped/1 xfailed, both SWIEPH+MOSEPH), ruff clean, mypy clean (pre-existing impact_harmony.py:98 only), OpenAPI regenerated+checked clean, import-hierarchy fixed (match.ten_gods registered Level 4), 4 snapshot fixtures rebaselined (diff-reviewed: only the intended derived_fields/spouse_star shape change). Real-boundary/deployed verification deferred (flag stays OFF in production; no T22-style smoke run for this sub-feature).
verified_by: orchestrator (Opus 4.8), 2026-07-04 - independent re-run of the full suite + manual diff review of OpenAPI and snapshot changes, not trusted from the implementing pass alone.

evidence_ref: T23 real-boundary smoke against the LIVE deployed backend https://api.fufire.space (Railway deployment b936ad89, SUCCESS 2026-07-04 18:58:56 CEST, commit a7c41e5 = main after DECISION-004 merge) with a real enterprise API key, 2026-07-04. Prior 'Online' status was NOT trusted as proof (CLAUDE.md discipline) -- verified served /openapi.json content directly, not just health/status. (1) live /openapi.json contains 'gender' + 'MatchPersonInput' (0 hits before locating the correct unprefixed path -- first attempt at /v1/openapi.json 404'd, corrected); (2) gender omitted -> spouse_star={source_status:PENDING_TABLES, blocked_by:GENDER_NOT_PROVIDED, occurrences:[]}; (3) gender=divers -> spouse_star={source_status:PENDING_TABLES, blocked_by:MISSING-008, occurrences:[]} -- confirmed NO fallback to male/female's rule; (4) gender=male -> CALCULATED, confidence 1.0, 3 located occurrences (1 primary_convention_god + 2 disruption_signal_god) for this real chart; (5) gender=female -> CALCULATED, confidence 1.0, 3 disruption_signal_god occurrences (zero primary -- a valid computed absence, not an error); (6) day_master_strength/yong_shen still honestly NEEDS_DOMAIN_REVIEW/PENDING_TABLES, confidence 0.0, blocked_by MISSING-003 (no fabrication introduced by this deploy); (7) recursive scan of the full live response for the five forbidden score keys: none found; (8) quality_flags.ephemeris_mode=SWIEPH (real ephemeris, no MOSEPH masquerade). Frontend VITE_FEATURE_HEHUN checked BEFORE this deploy via curl against the live landingpage llms.txt -- already true from the prior T22-FRONTEND launch, no frontend action taken or needed. Closes MISSING-007's real-boundary evidence gap for backend.
verified_by: orchestrator (Opus 4.8), live curl smoke against api.fufire.space with the real injected FUFIRE_API_KEYS enterprise key, 2026-07-04 -- not trusted from Railway 'Online' status alone; caught and corrected an own wrong-URL assumption before concluding the deploy itself was the problem.
